title: microlicia sellowiana
intro: Microlicia sellowiana, also known as the Sellow's microlicia, is a plant species in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and has been used to treat various ailments. Microlicia sellowiana can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
